---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new event, capability, or developer experience improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the change you want.

## Why this belongs in SenseKit

Explain why this fits the project thesis.

## Background constraints

If this depends on Apple background behavior, say whether you believe it is:

- `VERIFIED_BY_PLATFORM_DOCS`
- `REQUIRES_BENCH_TEST`
- `UNSAFE_TO_BUILD_AROUND`

## Alternatives considered

What other approach did you think about?
